title: Thai Chewy Cake
description: A unique Thai dessert made with semolina and a hint of zesty flavor. Perfect for warm weather.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine semolina, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together coconut milk, zesty, and vanilla extract.
Add crushed chewy and chopped Brazilian to the wet ingredients and mix well.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until combined.
Add eggs and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Pour the batter into a greased casserole dish.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
